item.g:title: Stainless Steel Pet Water Fountain Filters Pet Water Fountain Filters 8-Pack Replacement Filters With 4 Sponge Filters For Stainless Steel Cat Dog ...
item.g:description: "Pet Water Dispenser Filter Set (8 Filters + 4 Filters)Core Selling Points - Four-layer vertical filtration system: Non-woven fabric + Maifan stone + activated carbon + microporous cotton, layer by layer purification, effectively filtering hair, impurities and odors - Plug and Play Design: No tools required, replacement can be completed in less than 10 seconds, making it easy for novices to operate - Improved Pet Health: Filtered clean water can reduce the problem of black chin in pets and improve water intake - Long-lasting use: A set of 8 filter elements + 4 filter cotton to meet the needs of long-term use - Strong Adaptability: Suitable for a wide range of stainless steel pet water dispensersProduct Specifications - Overall Filter Element Size: 8.4cm × 4.3cm × 1.0cm (L×W× Thick) - Filter cotton size: 3.2cm × 2.8cm × 0.8cm - Package includes: 8 4-in-1 filter cartridges + 4 replacement filter cottons - Recommended replacement interval: Replace the filter every 4 weeksDetailed Explanation of Four-Layer Filtration System Hierarchy Material Features First Floor Non Woven Fabric Filters hair and bulky impurities Level 2 Mai Fan Stone Absorbs and deodorizes, purifies water quality, and is rich in minerals Level 3 Coir Activated Carbon Removes residual chlorine, odors and discolours Level 4 Microporous cotton Further filters fine impurities and softens water quality How to Use 1. First use: Soak the filter element in clean water for 5 minutes to ensure complete saturation 2. Installation: Open the water dispenser filter tank lid, the filter element (reverse side down), and fasten the lid 3. Replacement Cycle: It is recommended to replace it every 4 weeks to keep the water fresh 4. Precautions: Be sure to make sure the filter element is fully saturated before turning on the water dispenser, otherwise it may cause poor water discharge or overflowUsage Scenarios - Everyday Home: Provide fresh and filtered fresh water for cats and dogs 24 hours a day - Multi-pet households: When multiple pets share a water dispenser, replace the filter element regularly to ensure hygienic water quality Care: Provide higher-quality drinking water for pets with black chins and urinary problems - Sensitive period of seasonal change: During the spring and summer bacterial breeding seasons, change the filter element frequently to prevent gastrointestinal discomfort in petsTips - It must be soaked for 5 minutes before use to allow the filter cartridge to be completely saturated - Turning on the machine without sufficient soaking may cause water flow obstruction and overflow - Clean the water dispenser tank regularly for better use with filter elements - In areas with hard water quality, it is recommended to shorten the replacement cycle appropriately

item.g:title: Cat Water Fountain 4L – Stainless Steel Automatic Dispenser with LED Light for Cats – Built to Last
item.g:description: 4L Cat Water Fountain for Pet Dog LED Drinking Water Bowl Automatic Dispenser Features: -The main parts are made of food-grade 304 stainless steel, which is rust-proof, corrosion-resistant, wear-resistant, sturdy and durable. -It contains fewer small parts, which is easy to disassemble and put in the dishwasher for cleaning. The faucet simulates the faucet in the sink, which will arouse the interest of pets to drink water. -With a 4L capacity design, it can meet the drinking needs of large pets and can accommodate multiple pets at a time. -Equipped with a silent pump, the sponge filter can remove visible impurities such as hair, making the pump more durable. We recommend deep cleaning the pump once a month. -There is an LED translucent window so you can monitor the water level even while refilling. -Using a multiple filtration design, the water is first purified by the filter box net, and then enters the ion exchange resin and activated carbon filter layer. The activated carbon can remove dust and impurities in the water, and the ion exchange resin can remove calcium ions and magnesium ions in the water, which helps reduce the risk of urinary stones. item.g:title: Ultrasonic Dog Training Collar – 3-Mode Anti-Barking Deterrent for Dogs for Dogs – Effective Training
item.g:description: AUTOMATIC ANTI BARKING DEVICE - Our automatic dog bark deterrent senses the sound of a barking dog and emits ultrasonic waves to stop the unwanted behavior. This device can be used indoors or outdoors to deter your own dog, your neighbor's dog, or even stray dogs from barking excessively. With a detection range of 33 feet and an effective range of 50 feet, our anti-bark box utilizes ultrasonic frequencies of 13-15KHZ, 19-21KHZ, and 33-36KHZ to effectively discourage barking SUITABLE FOR INDOOR & OUTDOOR - The anti barking device can be used both indoors and outdoors, with IPX4 function, can achieve rain, snow, sunscreen and other effects, you do not have to worry about Anti Barking Device damage. Use the mounting hole on the back of the anti barking device to hang from a fence or tree or directly on a platform to completely free your hands to train your dog FRIENDLY TO HUMAN AND DOGS - Our anti barking device is designed to create a peaceful living environment for all. It does not emit any pungent smells, electric shocks, or annoying beeping noises, ensuring the safety and well-being of both dogs and humans. The ultrasonic waves are specifically tailored to be inaudible to humans and are harmless to human ears. To make this bark stopper more effective in training your dog to stop barking, please encouragement more on your dog while training 3 ADJUSTABLE FREQUENCY MODES DOG BARK STOPPER - Anti barking device has 3 adjustable modes. 15KHZ/30KHZ (automatic frequency conversion mode) is suitable for large naughty dogs. 20KHZ is suitable for docile or medium dogs. 30KHZ is suitable for small or sensitive dogs. Please use the 3 modes on your dog one by one and find out which modes is suitable for your dogs PROFESSIONAL TIPS - The device works on most of breeds and sizes dogs, but don't work on the following situations: aggressive dogs, noisy surroundings, hearing impaired dogs, more dogs together, dogs under 6 months or over 8 years. Some dogs may be afraid or dislike the ultrasonic sound, and they will not stop barking at the beginning. Please allow up to 2 weeks for training

item.g:title: Dog Bark Collar Rechargeable Waterproof Beep Vibration Static Stimulation Bark Stopper Automatic Identification Collar With 6 Intensity Dual Modes ...
item.g:description: *Features*: * Dual Training Modes *: Barking collar has beep,vibrate and static training modes to help your dog correct uncontrolled barking and develop better behavior;static stimulating mode is optional,you can customized this bark collar as a dog static shock bark collar or no static shock bark collar. Strong and powerful motor,also the static stimulating function conforms to ECMA form. * No False Trigger *: Adopt smart dog bark recognition chip and smart triggering technology,our collar will calculate accurately and enter in training modes. Thus it will not be influenced by external sound. * Suits For Most Dogs *: Collar strap has 25.6in in length and suits for dogs under 88lbs;the nylon strap of barking collar has a reflective strip for dogs in dark environments for added security. It is recommended to adjust the collar to fit the size of the dog and then leave a finger space;the collar is too loose or too tight will affect the usages. * 10 Days Runtime *: Adopt intelligent and IC Power Max technology,ensure battery life longer and less energy consumption,which solves the trouble of frequent charging,2Hrs full charge can be continuous used for 10 days. Also come with low battery icon reminding,you can charge the collar timely. * IPX6 Waterproof Dog Bark Stopper *: Water and snow resistant,anti-bark collar for dogs allowing safe use of the collar indoors and outdoors in all weather conditions. Please not let dog wear this collar to swim due to it may damage charging ports. Friendly Reminder: 1. Avoid leaving the collar on the dog for more than 12 hours per day. When it's possible, please repose the collar on the dog's neck every 1 to 2 hours. 2.Clean the collar weekly with a damp cloth. 3.If a rash or sore is found,please discontinue use of the collar until the skin has healed. 4.The bark stopper can only use on healthy dogs. 5.This bark stopper has two different anti bark mode:cyclic and fixed. A:Defaults mode is cycle mode. Under cyclic mode,first triggering is level 1 warning,if the dog continues to bark,then to level 2 warning,until the level 6 warning. B:Fixed mode(The LCD display will show the current corresponding level):You can adjust the level by pressing and holding the M button. The level changes from 1 to 6.And please release the button when you got the levels you want. 6.Not all barking will trigger,sometimes the dog barking is to welcome owner. We distinguished it via identification chip. The product is mainly for bad barking,continuous barking. *Specifications*: Product Type: Rechargeable Anti Bark Dog Collar Materials: ABS+PC Sound Decibel: 75dB Motor Quantity: 1Pc Battery Capacity: 1Pc 3.7V/500MAH, 1.85Wh Lithium-ion Battery(Included) Fully Charged Time: 2Hrs Runtime: About 10Days (Depending on intensity and modes) Input Voltage: 5V Waterproof performance: IPX6 (Can’t be worn to swim) Levels OF Vibration/Static Stimulation: 1-6Levels Suit For Dogs Under 40kg/88lbs Working Temperature: 0℃-45℃/32°F-113°F Standby Mode: 1Min Of Inactivity Protective Modes: Under 2 Working Modes, after the 6th intensity triggering, It Will Enter Protection Mode, Will Stop Working For 1Min And Flashing “0”. 2 Working Modes: 1.With Static Stimulation Function: With Beep, Vibration And Static Stimulation Function, And The Corresponding Red Stimulation Icon Is Displayed; 2.Without Static Stimulation Function: With Beep And Vibration Functions, Correspond Green Vibration Icon Is Displayed Memory Function: 20S-1Min Reactivated, Then Comes To Next Intensity Color: Black USB-DC Charging Cable Length: 63cm/24.8in Adjustable Collar Strap Length: 65cm/25.6in (Can Be Cut) Anti Bark Collar Size: 6.5x3.6x4cm/2.56x1.41x1.57in Anti Bark Collar Weight: 48g/0.11lbs Package Size: 9.5x9x5cm/3.74x3.54x1.97in Package Weight: 156g/0.34 lbs *Package Lists*: 1x Anti Bark Dog Collar 1x USB Charging Cable 1x Test Light Bulb 1x Warning Tag 1x Nylon Strap 2x Long Contact Points 2x Short Contact Points 2x Long Conductive Silicone Sleeves 2x Short Conductive Silicone Sleeves 1x User Manual
